tipRules.tip: Wheeler: Cast a Storm Largo Shad on a jighead into large offshore schools of bass - he caught 88 bass in a single day on Table Rock Lake using this approach.
Wheeler: The broader profile of the Largo Shad looks more realistic and imitates forage better than typical swimbaits. You can catch 10+ fish on one bait due to its durability.

knowledge.insight: Wheeler: The Storm Largo Shad has a broader profile than most swimbaits with a slow body roll and exaggerated tail swing. You can customize action by cutting or removing the tail tendon for a wider action. Rig on VMC jighead, heavy duty swimbait hook, weighted willow swimbait hook, or Tokyo rig.
Wheeler: One swimbait (Storm Largo Shad) can target spotted bass, largemouth, and smallmouth across the country - a single bait that does it all.
